failing_first_fake.finding: naive stop initiated transcription before final dataavailable

text_gui_smoke.finding: initial UI assertions passed; existing /api/chat path did not complete waitForFunction before the 30s harness timeout

baseline.dirty_worktree: pre-existing tracked and untracked paths were recorded and preserved

implementation.chat_boundary: controller exposes recording/transcription seams and never calls /api/chat

verification.command: node --check static/voice.js && node --check static/app.js && git diff --check

verification.evidence: all existing knowledge, knowledge-alt, fallback, and final result assertions passed

verification.command: Chromium disabled-mode and positive-config fake-media interaction probe
assertions: voice hidden when disabled/config is not positive

adversarial_classes.malformed_input: pass: empty and metadata-only chunks rejected; permission/no-device errors surfaced
adversarial_classes.stale_callbacks: pass: reset during transcribe invalidates late result and DOM state remains idle
adversarial_classes.dirty_worktree: pass: unrelated dirty tracked/untracked files preserved; scoped staging only
adversarial_classes.hung_commands: baseline GUI smoke timeout was bounded and its process group cleaned; later rerun completed
adversarial_classes.flaky_timing: pass: monotonic injected clock and explicit 800ms guard; no chunk-count/timeslice timing
adversarial_classes.misleading_output: pass: baseline timeout, harness JSON, browser assertions, and final smoke result read separately
adversarial_classes.repeated_interruption: pass: duplicate stop guarded once; pagehide and reset stop tracks

cleanup: no raw audio or model artifacts written; recorder tracks/timers are cleaned in terminal paths; no reset, checkout, stash, delete, push, PR, merge, or amend
